beta.changelog: - Add wattage and voltage in battery session chart

stable.changelog:
- Fix app crash when toggling lock sysfs node
- Add option to hide battery stats info in notification
- Fix top app monitoring failed to recognise certain apps (daemon side)
- Implement kill app when removed from recent task/menu (xposed)
- Fixed resident app not working in latest qpr2
- Fixed newly installed app not detected in profiler
- Resource optimisation
- Fix null top app in notification
- Added new live stats monitoring layout
- Fix bug on device with more than 3 cluster where last cluster can't be tuned
- Added recent app lock
- Connect governor parameter to profile
- Improved battery data collection
- Fix premium feature sometime doesnt work after screen lock
- Add import license button
- Drop accessibility service requirement in landing page
- Postpone apply profile by profiler while editing profile
- Properly handle profile when applyOnBoot disabled
- Added toast on profile change (disabled by default)
- Fixed delayed profile change
- Improve fps monitoring
- Added battery session detail
- Initial A13 support
